$comment: ADR-P013 Batches 1-2 + tsp semantics mini-slice - USDA FoodData Central foodPortion gram-weight provenance for slice, tablespoon, and accepted teaspoon foods. Human-reviewed manifest; the fdc-portion-manifest.spec.ts gate enforces schema, provenance, unit compatibility, gram-weight bounds, macro reconciliation against fdcPer100g, and authored-grams === derivedGramsPerServing. Never edit gram values without re-deriving them from the pinned archive.

tolerances.$comment: Macro-reconciliation gate (ADR-P013 acceptance criterion c). FDC per-100g macros scaled to derivedGramsPerServing must agree with the catalog's authored per-serving macros within these bounds.

entries.reviewNote: Catalog serving is 1 slice; SR portion 'slice' = 32 g. Non-toasted commercial record chosen over toasted/recipe variants. Reconciliation: 80.6 kcal vs 73 authored (delta 7.6 <= 25).
Catalog serving is 1 slice; SR offers regular (32 g), thin (25 g), snack (7 g) — 'slice, regular' matches the authored 81 kcal (reconciles to 82.9 kcal, delta 1.9).
Catalog food is generic 'Sprouted grain bread' (not brand-specific); SR 'Bread, wheat, sprouted' is the closest analytical record. Reconciliation: 71.4 kcal vs 85 authored (delta 13.6 <= 25).

Catalog serving is 2 slices; SR portion is exactly 2 slices = 57 g. 'Unprepared' reconciles (62.7 kcal vs 75, P 11.58 vs 11); the alternate 168383 'cooked, pan-fried' (slice = 13.8 g) FAILS the gate (40.3 kcal vs 75) and was rejected.

Catalog serving is 2 tbsp; SR commercial hummus portion is 1 tbsp = 15 g, so the full serving is 30 g. Commercial record chosen over home-prepared because it reconciles more closely with authored fat/calories. Reconciliation: 71.1 kcal vs 73 authored (within tolerance).

Catalog serving is 1 tbsp; SR grated parmesan portion is 1 tbsp = 5 g. Grated record matches the tablespoon serving better than shredded/low-sodium/topping variants. Reconciliation: 21.0 kcal vs 17 authored (within tolerance).

entries.fdcDescription: Peanut butter, smooth style, without salt
entries.reviewNote: Catalog serving is 2 tbsp; SR smooth without-salt portion is exactly 2 tbsp = 32 g. Chosen for the catalog natural/unsalted intent; salted/chunky variants also pass but are less specific. Reconciliation: 191.4 kcal vs 200 authored (within tolerance).

entries.fdcDescription: Nuts, almond butter, plain, without salt added
entries.reviewNote: Catalog serving is 2 tbsp; SR plain without-salt almond butter portion is 1 tbsp = 16 g, so the full serving is 32 g. Reconciliation: 196.5 kcal vs 214 authored (within tolerance).

Catalog serving is 2 tbsp; SR whole dried sesame seed portion is 1 tbsp = 9 g, so the full serving is 18 g. Whole-seed record matches the catalog name better than decorticated kernels. Reconciliation: 103.1 kcal vs 109 authored (within tolerance).
Catalog serving is 2 tbsp; SR hulled hemp seed portion is 3 tbsp = 30 g, so the full serving is 20 g. Reconciliation: 110.6 kcal vs 113 authored (within tolerance).

entries.fdcDescription: Seeds, sesame butter, tahini, from roasted and toasted kernels (most common type)
entries.reviewNote: Catalog serving is 2 tbsp; SR most-common roasted/toasted tahini portion is 1 tbsp = 15 g, so the full serving is 30 g. Reconciliation: 178.5 kcal vs 188 authored (within tolerance).

entries.fdcDescription: Nuts, cashew butter, plain, without salt added
entries.reviewNote: Catalog serving is 2 tbsp; SR plain without-salt cashew butter portion is 1 tbsp = 16 g, so the full serving is 32 g. Reconciliation: 187.8 kcal vs 200 authored (within tolerance).

entries.fdcDescription: Seeds, sunflower seed butter, without salt
entries.reviewNote: Catalog serving is 2 tbsp; SR sunflower seed butter without salt portion is 1 tbsp = 16 g, so the full serving is 32 g. Reconciliation: 197.4 kcal vs 196 authored (within tolerance).

Catalog serving is 1 tbsp; SR cold-pressed flaxseed oil portion is 1 tbsp = 13.6 g. Oil-like macro profile reconciles with the authored 14 g fat serving. Reconciliation: 120.2 kcal vs 126 authored (within tolerance).

Catalog serving is 2 tbsp; SR ready-to-serve salsa portion is exactly 2 tbsp = 36 g. Generic red salsa chosen over salsa verde and queso dip variants. Reconciliation: 10.4 kcal vs 8 authored (within tolerance).
Catalog serving is 1 tbsp; SR balsamic vinegar portion is 1 tbsp = 16 g. Reconciliation: 14.1 kcal vs 12 authored (within tolerance).

entries.fdcDescription: Soy sauce made from soy and wheat (shoyu), low sodium
entries.reviewNote: Catalog serving is 1 tbsp; SR low-sodium shoyu soy sauce portion is 1 tbsp = 14.2 g, matching the catalog low-sodium label. Reconciliation: 8.1 kcal vs 8 authored (within tolerance).

Catalog serving previously displayed tsp(5), but the authored macros align with one teaspoon/5 g, not five teaspoons. Corrected serving is 1 tsp; SR yellow mustard portion is 1 tsp or 1 packet = 5 g. Reconciliation: 3.0 kcal vs 0 authored (within tolerance).

Catalog serving previously displayed tsp(5), but the authored zero-macro condiment serving aligns with one teaspoon, not five teaspoons. Corrected serving is 1 tsp; SR Tabasco pepper sauce provides 1 tsp = 4.7 g. Reconciliation: 0.6 kcal vs 0 authored (within tolerance).

Catalog serving previously displayed tsp(3), but the authored macros align with one teaspoon/approximately 3 g, not three teaspoons. Corrected serving is 1 tsp; SR raw garlic portion is 1 tsp = 2.8 g. Reconciliation: 4.2 kcal vs 4 authored (within tolerance).

Catalog serving previously displayed tsp(2), but the authored zero-macro condiment serving aligns with one teaspoon/2 g, not two teaspoons. Corrected serving is 1 tsp; SR raw ginger portion is 1 tsp = 2 g. Reconciliation: 1.6 kcal vs 0 authored (within tolerance).

unmatched.reason: SR Legacy has no standalone sourdough record. The only sourdough-inclusive candidate 172675 'Bread, french or vienna (includes sourdough)' carries a 139 g 'slice' portion, which fails macro reconciliation against the authored 97 kcal slice (scaled estimate 378.1 kcal, delta 281 >> 25). Left null and gated per ADR-P013 (never force-fit); revisit in a later batch with a different pinned dataset (e.g. FNDDS) if desired.
SR Legacy has no light cream cheese tablespoon portion. Available cream-cheese-flavor frosting portions are preparation mismatches and fail macro reconciliation; left null/gated.
SR Legacy has a chia seed record but no tbsp/tablespoon portion row in the pinned archive; left null/gated rather than converting from ounces.

Catalog food is ground flaxseed. SR's ground 1 tbsp portion (7 g) fails macro reconciliation against the authored serving, while the passing whole-flaxseed portion is a preparation mismatch; left null/gated.
SR poppy seed 1 tbsp portion fails macro reconciliation against the authored serving; left null/gated.
Pinned SR Legacy archive has no standalone olive-oil tablespoon portion row (only an olive-oil mayonnaise product); left null/gated.
Pinned SR Legacy archive has no avocado-oil tablespoon portion row; left null/gated.
Pinned SR Legacy archive has no standalone canola-oil tablespoon portion row; left null/gated.
Pinned SR Legacy archive has no walnut-oil tablespoon portion row; left null/gated.
Pinned SR Legacy archive has no sesame-oil tablespoon portion row; left null/gated.
Pinned SR Legacy archive has no coconut-oil tablespoon portion row; left null/gated.
Pinned SR Legacy archive has no MCT-oil tablespoon portion row; left null/gated.
Pinned SR Legacy pesto records provide 0.25 cup portions, not tbsp portions; left null/gated rather than deriving a tablespoon conversion from cup volume.
Pinned SR Legacy has no nutritional-yeast tablespoon portion. Baker's yeast is a source/preparation mismatch and fails macro reconciliation; left null/gated.
SR no-salt tomato paste has a tbsp portion, but the authored catalog serving is 2 tbsp and macro reconciliation fails against the current rounded macros; left null/gated pending review.
SR cider vinegar has a tbsp portion, but the authored catalog macros are all zero while SR carries trace calories/carbs; left null/gated pending a low-impact zero-macro policy decision.
Catalog food is fresh lemon juice. Pinned SR Legacy tablespoon candidates are bottled/from-concentrate records; left null/gated rather than using a preparation mismatch.
Pinned SR Legacy has no matching Greek-yogurt herb dressing tablespoon portion; left null/gated.
Pinned SR Legacy has no tzatziki tablespoon portion; left null/gated.
